raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The legislation raises baseline standards of emergency preparedness for water districts servicing homes in high fire risk areas of Ventura County.",
    "The bill requires water districts to top off their water tanks after notification from Ventura County Emergency Services.",
    "The bill mandates that prompt backup power must be available to keep pumps working after power shutoffs.",
    "The bill requires fire hardening of appropriate water pumps and backup generators.",
    "A report is required after major fires, which must include information on tank water levels, performance of backup power, and effectiveness of fire hardening structures around water pumps and backup power.",
    "Fire hydrants will lose pressure or fail during massive wind-driven fires, highlighting the need for improved performance.",
    "The bill is described as an important first step toward ensuring that water supplies are more resilient to wildfires."
  ]
}
```
